project_meta.theme_preference: Light/Dark toggle (Default Dark with Soft Ambers)
project_meta.aesthetic_goals: Calm, reflective, focused, organic. Not a standard 'tech' app. Feels like reading a premium, beautifully typeset physical book with modern digital affordances.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the text to breathe. Use p-6 or p-8 for main containers.
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto h-full flex flex-col (mobile-first container) or max-w-2xl for reader view.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-2 gap-4. Dashboards use bento style (e.g., span-2 for main progress, span-1 for streak/grace day).

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-md
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground font-medium px-6 py-3

heatmap.description: Grid of small rounded squares (w-3 h-3 rounded-sm). Color intensity depends on chapters read.

streak_tracker.design: Circular progress or bold typographic number. Include a small leaf or amber icon indicating 'Grace Day' available.

bible_map.design: Grid of pills or a hex layout representing books. Completed: bg-primary text-primary-foreground. In Progress: border-primary text-primary. Unread: bg-muted text-muted-foreground.

milestone_badges.design: Soft glassmorphism cards with amber/gold glowing icons. Use Phosphor Icons (duotone) for a premium look.

reader_view.design: Distraction-free. Scroll hides navigation. Chapter summaries (TL;DR) in a soft muted callout box at the top. Tap verse to open Note-Taking bottom drawer.

daily_verse_backgrounds.description: Calm sunset lake, use with black/50 overlay for white text daily verse.

mood_reading_background.description: Warm sunset walking, great for 'Anxious' or 'Reflective' mood cards.

auth_background.description: Abstract warm amber light gradient for the top of the auth screen.

icons.usage: Use duotone or light weights. E.g., BookOpen, Flame (Streak), Map, Pen (Notes), Moon/Sun (Theme Toggle).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure soft amber meets 4.5:1 ratio on the dark #1A1614 background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Implement the custom color palette in tailwind.config.js.
The app requires a manual theme toggle but respects system settings. Use standard Tailwind dark mode (class based).
For the Heat Map, map the reading history to an array and render a grid of small divs using the 'heatmap_scale' colors based on intensity.
For the Bible Map, use a responsive grid. Since it's mobile-first, a 3-column or 4-column scrolling grid of rounded-lg buttons works best.
The Reader View MUST use the 'Cormorant Garamond' serif font for the actual biblical text. The UI around it (nav, notes) should use the sans-serif font.
Integrate Shadcn primitives where needed (e.g., Drawer/Sheet for the note-taking feature, Tabs for plan selection).
Use the provided Unsplash URLs for rich, immersive backgrounds on the Auth screen and Daily Verse cards. Apply appropriate overlays (bg-black/40) so text remains highly readable.
